use_cases: User account registration for SaaS applications
New user signup flows for web platforms
Onboarding flow entry point for web services
ai_summary: A minimalist signup form component from shadcnblockscom designed for user registration and authentication. Features clean, accessible form inputs with standard validation patterns, optimized for SaaS and web applications. Includes email and password fields with a call-to-action button, following shadcn/ui design principles for consistent styling and accessibility.
